title: Pursue a **cashflow-first, leverage-second** path: build one repeatable income engine that can be systematized, then funnel surplus into boring compounding assets. The strongest route is usually **a productized service or small digital asset with clear buyer pain**, because it can generate cash quickly, be automated, and create reusable leverage.
rationale: Opportunity thesis preserved from prior wealth-and-leverage research and staged for explicit review.

transitions.rationale: Opportunity thesis preserved from prior wealth-and-leverage research and staged for explicit review.

rationale: Opportunity thesis preserved from prior wealth-and-leverage research and staged for explicit review.

transitions.rationale: Opportunity thesis preserved from prior wealth-and-leverage research and staged for explicit review.

rationale: Opportunity thesis preserved from prior wealth-and-leverage research and staged for explicit review.

transitions.rationale: Opportunity thesis preserved from prior wealth-and-leverage research and staged for explicit review.

title: 3. **Niche lead-gen asset** that can be sold or licensed.
rationale: Opportunity thesis preserved from prior wealth-and-leverage research and staged for explicit review.

transitions.rationale: Opportunity thesis preserved from prior wealth-and-leverage research and staged for explicit review.
